name: clawdflare
description: Opinionated Cloudflare management CLI and MCP server for auditing and fixing zones.

interface.shortDescription: Audit Cloudflare zones and fix DNS with local authorization.
interface.longDescription: Clawdflare brings the Eidos CLI-first Cloudflare workflow into Codex: inspect accounts, zones, DNS, SSL/TLS, and opinionated audit findings through the CLI or MCP tools, dry-run DNS changes such as CNAME upserts, then require local Touch ID or PIN authorization before write operations.
defaultPrompt: Use Clawdflare to audit this Cloudflare zone.
Use Clawdflare to create or update the DNS record for this deployment.
List my configured Clawdflare accounts and active account.
Dry-run Cloudflare fixes before asking me to authorize them.
